title: Monday.com Expert from Brazil

posts.author: A.A.Figueiredo (Alexandre Almeida Figueiredo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello friends,

I would like to introduce ourselves.

We are a company located in São Paulo/Brazil specialized in project and process management, providing services such as business consulting, solutions, training and certifications.

We are experts to apply monday.com in different types of businesses and segments.

You can find below the link to our website:

A.A.Figueiredo

Project, Process and Team Management with monday.com | Micro, Small and...

How to do Project, Process and Team Management? We are official partners of monday.com, a company specialized in Work OS. Discover our Consulting, Management, Solutions and Training services, focused on Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises.

Best regards,
Alexandre Figueiredo
A.A.Figueiredo Ltda.

A.A.Figueiredo

Consultoria Empresarial, Soluções e Treinamentos | São Paulo | A.A.Figueiredo

Nossas atividades contemplam soluções completas para ajudar os líderes empresariais na escolha da melhor estratégia e no aprimoramento da gestão de projetos, gestão de processos, gestão comercial, gestão da qualidade e soluções de transformação...
